chapter_title.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to zur'ah From sama'ah

text: و ما كان فيه عن زرعة، عن سماعة فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن الحسين بن سعيد، عن أخيه الحسن، عن زرعة بن محمّد الحضرميّ، عن سماعة بن مهران‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Zur'ah, from Sama'ah has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa, from Al-Husayn ibn Said, from his brother Al-Hasan, from Zur'ah ibn Muhammad Al-Hadrami, from Sama'ah ibn Mihran.
